name: symptom-radar
description: TemPredict-inspired biometric strain detection for the Ultrahuman Ring, running entirely on Cloudflare (Workers + Cron + D1) in TypeScript, with webhook notifications and a dashboard.

ULTRAHUMAN_TOKEN.description: **Required.** Your Ultrahuman Partner API token, sent verbatim as the `Authorization` header. Generate one at [vision.ultrahuman.com](https://vision.ultrahuman.com/developer-docs).

WEBHOOK_URL.description: *Optional.* Where the daily strain report is POSTed. A Slack/Discord incoming-webhook URL, or any endpoint that accepts JSON. Leave blank to disable notifications.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: *Optional.* A long random string that guards the admin endpoints (`POST /api/run`, `POST /api/backfill`). Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`. If unset, those endpoints are disabled.

DASHBOARD_TOKEN.description: *Optional.* If set, viewing the dashboard and read APIs requires this token (`?token=` or `Authorization: Bearer`). Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`. Leave blank for a public dashboard.
